jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Wrogn
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
